---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for AegisXAI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions you've thought about.

**Which module does this affect?**
- [ ] Dashboard page (new or existing)
- [ ] ML model / prediction pipeline
- [ ] UI/UX (CSS, layout, components)
- [ ] Backend / API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure (Docker, CI/CD)

**Additional context**
Screenshots, mockups, or references to similar implementations.
